theory.canonical_statement: ID5488 records Current Density as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\8.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $ := J (-Skew[ω] J ω - η Sign[s] - k s + Λ̇ Skew[R_d^T R - I] + Skew[R_d^T Ṙ_d]) to drive the system trajectories onto the sliding manifold and maintain them there, ensuring robust performance in the presence of uncertainties and disturbances. Adaptive control strategies, such as the parameter estimation law ˙̂J := -Γ_J Skew[ R_d^T R - I] ω^T and the adaptive control law $
canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
\[
$ := J (-Skew[ω] J ω - η Sign[s] - k s + Λ̇ Skew[R_d^T R - I] + Skew[R_d^T Ṙ_d]) to drive the system trajectories onto the sliding manifold and maintain them there, ensuring robust performance in the presence of uncertainties and disturbances. Adaptive control strategies, such as the parameter estimation law ˙̂J := -Γ_J Skew[ R_d^T R - I] ω^T and the adaptive control law $
\]
